rows.label: tev066501_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev066501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Ni Zinga about Ga Derg.

rows.label: tev066501_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev066501_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Ni Zinga if anything
is troubling him.

rows.label: tev066501_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Ni Zinga about the Larsian kingdom.

rows.label: tev066501_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask Ni Zinga if anything
is troubling him.

rows.label: tev066501_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Ni Zinga about recent developments.

rows.label: tev066501_SEL1041
rows.name:
Ask Ni Zinga if he's heard
any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev066501_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Ni Zinga about recent developments.

rows.label: tev066501_SEL2041
rows.name:
Ask Ni Zinga if he's heard
any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev066501_MSG0001
rows.name:
Has Prince Jiarg granted you an
audience? Mind your manners if so.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG0002
rows.name:
Our current accommodations may be
humble, but all the same, he is the
last of the great Larsian royal lineage.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG0003
rows.name:
Under normal circumstances, not
even we generals would be allowed
to approach him unbidden.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG0008
rows.name:
We can find our own way out
of our present difficulties.
We do not want your help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG0012
rows.name:
The Larsian kingdom was situated in a barren land.
To survive there, my people worked as mercenaries.
It has been this way since times of yore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG0013
rows.name:
But the Growth saw our strength and desired it.
So they threatened our clients until every planet
that had hired our soldiers cut ties with us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG0014
rows.name:
We could not keep ourselves properly equipped.
We were starving. And so, in the end, we groveled
before the Growth in pathetic servitude.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG0015
rows.name:
So you see, it was through underhanded
cowardice that my kingdom fell.
...But that was the old kingdom.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG0016
rows.name:
Here in these caves, we have founded a new kingdom!
Like our ancestors before us, we shall send our
valiant warriors to battle in the name of Lars.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG0021
rows.name:
Our mortal enemy, the queen
jacul, must be struck down.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG0022
rows.name:
But to do this, we will
need many soldiers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG0023
rows.name:
I hear that you have claimed a
victory over not just Lady Buidhe,
but Prince Jiarg as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG0024
rows.name:
We could use your strength, if you
are willing to share it. I shall
tell you more when the time comes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG1001
rows.name:
The monster is finally dead. My slain
friends and departed son can rest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG1002
rows.name:
I thank you, [ST:playername ]. This
accomplishment belongs to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG1003
rows.name:
Now, let us strike down our
reviled Growth enemies and put
the last of our grudges to rest![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG1004
rows.name:
Come, Three Talons! Whet your
blades and steel your hearts!
Our final battle draws near![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG1009
rows.name:
In the days of our old kingdom, strong
warriors would gather for a yearly tournament
known as the Larsian Battle Gauntlet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG1010
rows.name:
I have heard a Larsian in NLA
is trying to resurrect this
tradition here on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG1011
rows.name:
You look to be a warrior of not
insignificant strength. Perhaps you
should have a run at the Gauntlet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG1012
rows.name:
Ever since hearing of it, the Three Talons have
been yearning to enter and test their might
against Mira's proudest and strongest. Ha ha ha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG2001
rows.name:
With our hated enemy destroyed, the
Three Talons and I had renewed our
vows to strike the Growth down.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG2002
rows.name:
But now that task falls to me
alone. And I will not fail![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG2003
rows.name:
Do you hear me, Three Talons?! Watch
Ni Zinga from heaven as he and his
men bring this battle to a close![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG2008
rows.name:
In the days of our old kingdom, strong
warriors would gather for a yearly tournament
known as the Larsian Battle Gauntlet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG2009
rows.name:
I have heard a Larsian in NLA
is trying to resurrect this
tradition here on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG2010
rows.name:
You look to be a warrior of not
insignificant strength. Perhaps you
should have a run at the Gauntlet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066501_MSG2011
rows.name:
Were the Three Talons alive, I am sure they
would have entered the Gauntlet themselves
and fought to within an inch of their lives.[ST:wait ]
